I simply never read the unit and game design channel, so hopefully there are other mods who are concerned with him and ban him if he repeatedly breaks the rules. I did not bring this up for myself, but because this was the 100th time I read a salty discussion that was all about SSP and I don't like this at all. I want a real solution to people's problems and this seemed like the most logical (although radical) thing to do. I also wanted to draw the attention to this to start a discussion that will in the end lead to a final solution. We should finally change up our minds and not always talk without much weight or any action taken.
